final:
module up_counter(
    input               rst         ,
    input               reset       ,
    input               enable      ,
    output  reg [2:0]   count
);

    always @(posedge rst) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 3'b000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
